subcodes.first_line: O scion of the Kingdom! Render thanks unto God for having guided thee to the path of God and made thee one of the children of His Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن الملکوت فاشکر الله بما هداک الی سبیل الله و جعلک من ابناء ملکوته بین
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
